heading: I. GLOBAL LIGHTING
text: Flat or simple gradient lighting suitable for 2D parallax side-scrollers. Avoid heavy realistic volumetric shadows.

heading: II. BACKGROUND RULES
text: All generated isolated objects must sit on a pure #FFFFFF white or solid neutral gray background to easily key out.

heading: III. DIMENSION RULES
text:
- **Icons**: Must occupy exactly 80% of the canvas framing, perfectly centered
- **Characters**: Full body visibility, drawn strictly from a side-view profile (facing right)
- **Obstacles**: Designed as vertical pillars expanding from top or bottom edges, with clear horizontal path gaps

heading: IV. PERSPECTIVE RULES
text: Strictly 2D side-profile (orthographic projection). Absolutely no 3D depth, isometric angles, or top-down perspective.
